messages.content:
Summarize the CVE description using professional cybersecurity terms.

In Raptor RDF Syntax Library through 2.0.16, there is a heap-based buffer over-read when parsing triples with the nquads parser in raptor_ntriples_parse_term_internal().

The Raptor RDF Syntax Library up to version 2.0.16 contains a heap-based buffer over-read vulnerability occurring during the parsing of RDF triples in the nquads parser within the 'raptor_ntriples_parse_term_internal()' function.
